name: Orange Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Egg beaters (99% Real Egg) Product
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour and baking soda; set aside.
2. In a medium bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed, beat margarine, 1 cup sugar, orange peel, and vanilla until creamy.
3. Add egg beaters; beat until smooth.
4. Gradually stir in the flour mixture until blended.
5. Cover; chill dough for 1 hour.
6. Shape dough into 42 balls (about 3/4 inch).
7. Place on lightly greased baking sheets, about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes or until light golden brown.
9. Remove from sheets; cool on wire racks.
Makes 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
